hyperedges.shared_concept: Phase 01 Infrastructure Bundle — all artifacts produced during Phase 01 execution covering schema, backend scaffold, Evolution and N8N provisioning.
RAG Pipeline Assembly — the plan, retrieval strategy, vector store and embedder that together let the agent answer diet questions grounded in the patient PDF.
Concurrency Cluster — fire-and-forget webhook design surfaces idempotency (P2-7), double-count (P0-1) and race between welcome and diet processing (P2-8).

hyperedges.label: Wave 3 Relatorio Semanal flow (RPC + service + cron)

nodes.label: .continue-here
nodes.description: Historical handoff document (2026-06-22) documenting pending work on lembretes (item #4) and relatorio parrudo (item #5) after refinamento agente session.

nodes.label: NEXT-SESSION
nodes.description: Current handoff (2026-07-05) documenting PR #1 with streaks + P0-2b + 5 auditoria fixes on branch claude/nutrichat-streaks-feature-ongoxm, 267 tests green.

nodes.label: P1-6-PLANO
nodes.description: Plan to extract meal times from diet PDF before asking in interview step 14. Avoids inventing schedules and syncing wrong data to alertas_config.

nodes.label: PROJECT
nodes.description: Project overview for NutriChat: WhatsApp nutritional assistant with stack table, requirements, key decisions and visual identity (colors, plans).

nodes.label: REFINAMENTO-AGENTE
nodes.description: Bug catalog with P0-1 (double-count), P0-2 (silent quantity), P0-2b (preparo), P1-3/4/5/6, P2-7/8/9, SEC-1/2/3, plus new message experience design.

nodes.label: REQUIREMENTS
nodes.description: 44 v1 requirements: AGENT-01 to 20, AUTH-01/02/03, PANEL-01 to 06, LANDING-01 to 08, INFRA-01 to 07, with phase traceability matrix.

nodes.label: ROADMAP
nodes.description: 7-phase roadmap covering plans, dependencies and success criteria for NutriChat v1.0 milestone.

nodes.label: STATE
nodes.description: Project state at 90% completion of v1.0 milestone. Executing Phase 6 landing page, plan 06-01 done, 06-02 pending.

nodes.label: 01-01-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 1 Plan 01: Supabase schema migrations creating 5 tables plus pgvector extension for RAG chunks.

nodes.label: 01-01-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 1 Plan 01 execution: schema created in Supabase project iqpoohthfhmjkvrqxzns.

nodes.label: 01-02-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 1 Plan 02: Backend Express/TypeScript scaffold plus Docker Compose plus Railway deploy prep.

nodes.label: 01-02-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 1 Plan 02 execution: backend scaffolded with Express, TypeScript, Docker Compose local infrastructure.

nodes.label: 01-03-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 1 Plan 03: Evolution API v2.3.7 setup and N8N workflows scaffolding on local Docker environment.

nodes.label: 01-03-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 1 Plan 03: Evolution API and N8N containers up on ports 8081/5678 respectively.

nodes.label: 01-CONTEXT
nodes.description: Phase 1 decisions catalog D-01 through D-11 covering schema, TypeScript, Evolution API, dev environment.

nodes.label: 01-DISCUSSION-LOG
nodes.description: Phase 1 discussion log with options considered per decision (alternative stacks, tradeoffs).

nodes.label: 02-01-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 2 Plan 01: Webhook routing implementation covering backend/src/routes/webhook.ts, services/evolution.ts, routes/api.ts.

nodes.label: 02-01-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 2 Plan 01: fire-and-forget webhook pattern implemented, N8N integration validated.

nodes.label: 02-02-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 2 Plan 02: RAG pipeline implementation with services/rag.ts and migration 005 creating dieta_chunks table with pgvector HNSW index.

nodes.label: 02-02-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 2 Plan 02: RAG pipeline operational with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (1536 dims) and pgvector.

nodes.label: 02-03-PLAN
nodes.description: Phase 2 Plan 03: Boas-vindas and 7-step interview implementation in services/agent.ts, services/conversation.ts plus migration 006 for entrevista tables.

nodes.label: 02-03-SUMMARY
nodes.description: Summary of Phase 2 Plan 03: onboarding flow operational, TMB/hidratacao/creatina calculations working.

nodes.label: NutriChat Project
nodes.description: WhatsApp-based nutritional assistant in pt-BR that automates onboarding, indexes diet PDFs via RAG, and answers patient questions using Claude AI.

nodes.label: Supabase Cloud
nodes.description: Database, storage and pgvector host. Project iqpoohthfhmjkvrqxzns hosts pacientes, dietas, mensagens, entrevistas, registros_diarios and dieta_chunks tables.

nodes.label: Evolution API v2.3.7
nodes.description: Open-source WhatsApp gateway running in Docker on port 8081. Sends messages.upsert events to backend webhook.

nodes.label: N8N
nodes.description: Workflow orchestrator for alerts, daily reports and diet expiration. Runs in Docker on port 5678. Not in message hot path (Evolution posts directly to backend).

nodes.label: Claude AI
nodes.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 powers the agent conversations. Claude Haiku 4.5 handles macros and classifier tasks. Accessed via Anthropic SDK.

nodes.label: RAG Pipeline
nodes.description: PDF is parsed via pdf-parse, chunked with RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter, embedded via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (1536 dims), stored in pgvector with HNSW index.

nodes.label: Backend Express/TypeScript
nodes.description: Node.js 20 Express server in /backend directory. Fire-and-forget webhook pattern returns 200 before processing to avoid N8N timeout.

nodes.label: Docker Compose Local
nodes.description: 5-service local stack: postgres, redis, evolution-api, n8n, backend. Provides isolated dev environment mirroring Railway production.

nodes.label: pgvector HNSW
nodes.description: PostgreSQL extension providing vector similarity search. HNSW index accelerates cosine similarity queries over 1536-dim OpenAI embeddings.

nodes.label: Row-Level Security
nodes.description: Supabase Postgres RLS policies isolate patient data. Enforced at row-level per paciente_id for pacientes, dietas, mensagens, registros_diarios tables.

nodes.label: registros_diarios
nodes.description: Meal accumulation table with UNIQUE(paciente_id, data) constraint. RPC acumular_registro_diario upserts daily totals for calories/macros.

nodes.label: Railway
nodes.description: Backend and N8N hosting platform chosen for its git-driven deploys and simple pricing model. Alternative to Fly.io and Render considered in discussion log.

nodes.label: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
nodes.description: Embedding model producing 1536-dim vectors. Used via LangChain OpenAIEmbeddings wrapper. Batched to 20 to respect rate limit.

nodes.label: Groq Whisper
nodes.description: Audio transcription service for WhatsApp voice notes. Planned for Phase 3 multimodal support.

nodes.label: GSD Framework
nodes.description: Get Shit Done phased planning framework producing XX-YY-PLAN, XX-YY-SUMMARY, XX-CONTEXT and XX-DISCUSSION-LOG artifacts per phase.

nodes.label: Fire-and-Forget Webhook
nodes.description: Webhook returns res.status(200) BEFORE async processing to prevent N8N/Evolution timeout when Claude call takes several seconds. Documented as decision in 02-01.

nodes.label: 7-Step Interview
nodes.description: Onboarding conversation collecting: nome, idade, sexo, peso, altura, atividade fisica, horarios refeicoes. Feeds TMB, hidratacao and creatina calculations.

nodes.label: P0-1 Double Count
nodes.description: Bug where confirmed meal was accumulated twice due to non-idempotent upsert. Requires webhook idempotency (see P2-7).

nodes.label: P0-2 Silent Quantity
nodes.description: Bug where agent silently assumes portion size without asking user, distorting daily nutritional accounting.

nodes.label: P0-2b Preparo
nodes.description: Bug where preparation method (fried vs grilled) is ignored when computing calories/macros. Fixed as part of PR #1 auditoria.

nodes.label: P1-3 Intent Regex
nodes.description: Bug in intent detection regex causing saldo/reset commands to not fire. Fixed via SALDO_RE pattern and backoff in Fase A refinamento.

nodes.label: P1-4 Activity Factor
nodes.description: Bug where activity factor for TMB calculation used wrong coefficient tier. Requires interview step 6 clarification.

nodes.label: P1-5 MyFitnessPal
nodes.description: Bug/gap where MyFitnessPal-style database lookups fall back inconsistently. Design refinement pending.

nodes.label: P1-6 Diet Times
nodes.description: Bug where interview asks meal times even when PDF diet already specifies them. Plan documents extraction via Claude Haiku with temperature 0.

nodes.label: P2-7 Webhook Idempotency
nodes.description: Concurrency bug: duplicate messages.upsert events cause double processing. Solution requires message_id dedup key.

nodes.label: P2-8 Race Condition
nodes.description: Race between enviarBoasVindas and processarDieta both fire-and-forget: interview may reach step 14 before PDF is processed.

nodes.label: P2-9 Memory
nodes.description: Bug where conversation memory context grows unboundedly. Requires summarization or windowed compaction.

nodes.label: SEC-1
nodes.description: Security item covering API key rotation and env var hygiene. Cataloged in REFINAMENTO-AGENTE.

nodes.label: SEC-2
nodes.description: Security item covering RLS coverage audit for new tables (registros_diarios, entrevistas).

nodes.label: SEC-3
nodes.description: Security item covering webhook signature verification for Evolution API events.

nodes.label: D-01
nodes.description: Decision to use Supabase Cloud as the single-vendor Postgres + Storage + pgvector host.

nodes.label: D-02
nodes.description: Decision to use TypeScript with strict mode for backend to catch nutritional math errors at compile time.

nodes.label: D-03
nodes.description: Decision to adopt Evolution API v2.3.7 as WhatsApp gateway to avoid Meta Business API monthly fees.

nodes.label: D-11
nodes.description: Decision on dev environment: Docker Compose locally mirrors Railway production topology for parity.

nodes.label: Phase 01 Infrastructure
nodes.description: Phase covering Supabase schema, backend scaffold, Evolution API and N8N Docker setup. Complete.

nodes.label: Phase 02 Core Agent
nodes.description: Phase covering webhook routing, RAG pipeline, boas-vindas and 7-step interview. Complete.

nodes.label: Phase 06 Landing Page
nodes.description: Phase covering nutrichat-landing site with Tailwind v4, PhoneCanvas 3D, Header, Hero. Plan 06-01 done; 06-02 pending.

nodes.label: Streaks Feature
nodes.description: Gamification feature tracking consecutive days of adherence. Emitted as sprout emoji when streak thresholds hit. Fixed and pushed via PR #1.

nodes.label: v1.0 Milestone
nodes.description: Current milestone at 90% completion. Covers 7 phases and 20 plans total, with 18 plans completed.

nodes.label: Calculos de TMB, hidratacao e creatina (02-04-PLAN)
nodes.norm_label: calculos de tmb, hidratacao e creatina (02-04-plan)

nodes.label: Plan 04-03 Summary: Relatorio Semanal + Registro de Agua
nodes.norm_label: plan 04-03 summary: relatorio semanal + registro de agua

nodes.label: D-07 D-08 Backend multipart + RAG fire-and-forget
nodes.norm_label: d-07 d-08 backend multipart + rag fire-and-forget
